nasb.text: Then she fell on her face, bowing to the ground and said to him, “Why have I found favor in your sight that you should take notice of me, since I am a foreigner?”

esv.text: Then she fell on her face, bowing to the ground, and said to him, “Why have I found favor in your eyes, that you should take notice of me, since I am a foreigner?”

cnv.text: 路得就俯伏在地叩拜，對他說：“我是個外族人，為甚麼會在你眼前蒙恩，蒙你關照呢？”

ccb.text: 路得就俯伏在地叩谢他，说：“我不过是个外族人，你为什么这样恩待我、体恤我？”

csbs.text: 路得就脸伏于地下拜，对波阿斯说：“我是一个外邦女子，为什么会在你眼中蒙恩，受你关照呢？”
